description: Data retrieval, analysis, APIs, and information tools

questions.question: Retrieve the current weather for San Francisco
questions.expected_behavior: Return structured weather data with temperature, conditions, humidity
variants: What's the weather like in San Francisco right now?
Get current weather conditions for SF

questions.question: Summarize the top 5 trending topics from recent news
questions.expected_behavior: Return relevant, recent topics with brief descriptions
variants: What are the current trending news topics?
Give me a summary of today's top stories

questions.question: Parse and extract entities from: 'Apple Inc. reported $89.5B revenue in Q1 2026 at their Cupertino HQ'
questions.expected_behavior: Extract: company (Apple Inc.), amount ($89.5B), time (Q1 2026), location (Cupertino)
variants: Extract named entities from this text about Apple's revenue
What entities can you identify in this financial statement?
